question: The line chart shows earnings from 2018 to 2022. Which of the following statements is correct based on the chart?

options.C: Earnings increased every year from 2018 to 2022.
options.D: It is not possible to determine from the chart which of the last two years had higher earnings because the top of the line is clipped.

explanation: The scale is set so that the highest bars exceed the visible area, leading to a misleading impression of equality.
